focus: Limited Drops + Premium Tier + Milestone Rewards

items.name: Pumpkin Hull
items.description: Halloween limited hull: carved pumpkin-texture with emissive orange glow from hull seams and a grinning nose-panel.
items.flavor_text: The hull grins. The pilot grins back, briefly. Neither one blinks first.
items.art_prompt_hints: halloween ship hull, carved pumpkin texture with emissive orange glow from hull seams and grinning nose panel, spooky seasonal

items.name: Ghost Trail
items.description: Halloween limited trail: spectral white wisp that lingers behind the ship with occasional whisper-face formations.
items.flavor_text: The trail follows. Not the ship. The ship only recently noticed. Still keeps flying.
items.art_prompt_hints: halloween engine exhaust trail, spectral white wisp with occasional whisper-face formations, haunting seasonal

items.name: Nightmare Cockpit
items.description: Halloween limited cockpit: twisted bone-and-onyx cockpit interior with faint red emissive veins running along the frame spine.
items.flavor_text: The cockpit looks at the pilot. Which is new. The pilot stays curious.
items.art_prompt_hints: halloween cockpit interior, twisted bone and onyx interior with faint red emissive veins along frame spine, unsettling seasonal

items.name: Santa Hat Cockpit Topper
items.description: Christmas limited cockpit topper: red velvet Santa hat perched on the dashboard crown, white fur trim, sprig of holly.
items.flavor_text: The pilot refuses to explain the hat. The hat refuses to leave.
items.art_prompt_hints: christmas cockpit decor, red velvet santa hat on dashboard crown with white fur trim and sprig of holly, warm seasonal

items.name: Reindeer Trail
items.description: Christmas limited trail: soft golden exhaust shaped like a pulled reindeer-sleigh wake, with faint jingle audio tag.
items.flavor_text: The trail pulls something nobody installed. Scanners show a sleigh. Pilots pretend otherwise.
items.art_prompt_hints: christmas engine exhaust trail, soft golden plume shaped like a reindeer sleigh wake with faint jingle tag, warm seasonal

items.name: Snowstorm Battle Board
items.description: Christmas limited battle board: heavy snowstorm over a quiet frozen station, with animated drift and soft wind audio layer.
items.flavor_text: The storm keeps snowing. The station keeps standing. The duel finishes, somehow.
items.art_prompt_hints: christmas battle board backdrop, heavy snowstorm over frozen station with animated drift and soft wind audio, cold seasonal

items.name: Founder Phoenix Hull
items.description: Anniversary limited hull: signature phoenix-motif hull with animated gold ember plating and a commemorative anniversary numeral on the spine.
items.flavor_text: The bird keeps rising. So does the pilot. The spine reminds both.
items.art_prompt_hints: anniversary ship hull, phoenix motif with animated gold ember plating and commemorative anniversary numeral on spine, legendary seasonal

items.name: Anniversary Commemorative Banner
items.description: Anniversary limited banner: gold-foil commemorative banner with animated constellation arrangement marking the year.
items.flavor_text: Issued only once a year. The pilot owns one. Nobody asks which year.
items.art_prompt_hints: anniversary profile banner, gold foil commemorative with animated constellation arrangement marking the year, prestigious seasonal

items.name: First Year Trail
items.description: Anniversary limited trail: radiant golden exhaust with the numeral '1' briefly drawn in particulate mid-trail on each boost.
items.flavor_text: The numeral fades, then reappears. The pilot pretends not to count them.
items.art_prompt_hints: anniversary engine exhaust trail, radiant golden plume with numeral briefly drawn in particulate mid-trail on boost, celebratory seasonal

items.name: Tropical Hull
items.description: Summer limited hull: bright coral-and-turquoise tropical paint scheme with palm silhouette decals on both wings.
items.flavor_text: The hull looks like a postcard. The pilot pretends it is vacation.
items.art_prompt_hints: summer ship hull, bright coral turquoise tropical paint with palm silhouette decals on wings, playful seasonal

items.name: Beach Vibes Bobblehead
items.description: Summer limited bobblehead: tiny sunglasses-and-float lounging figure on a spring base, with a faint ukulele loop on nod.
items.flavor_text: The figure refuses to fly seriously. The pilot tries to match the mood. Fails cheerfully.
items.art_prompt_hints: summer cockpit bobblehead, tiny sunglasses-and-float lounging figure on spring base with faint ukulele audio tag, playful seasonal

items.name: Sunset Trail
items.description: Summer limited trail: wide orange-to-pink gradient wake with soft cloud particulate drifting slowly outward.
items.flavor_text: The color of a view nobody wants to leave. The pilot leaves anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: summer engine exhaust trail, wide orange-to-pink gradient wake with soft cloud particulate drifting outward, golden hour seasonal

items.name: Expansion Launch Commemorative Hull
items.description: Expansion launch limited hull: animated launch-signature hull marking the release of a new card set, with set sigil etched into both wings.
items.flavor_text: The hull marks the moment the new set went live. History now.
items.art_prompt_hints: expansion launch ship hull, animated launch signature with set sigil etched into wings, commemorative event

items.name: Expansion Launch Signature Trail
items.description: Expansion launch limited trail: animated signature exhaust with the set sigil rendered in light particulate every few seconds.
items.flavor_text: The sigil appears, fades, reappears. Nobody agrees on what it means. Pilots sell it anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: expansion launch engine exhaust trail, animated signature with set sigil rendered in light particulate periodically, event-themed

items.name: Expansion Launch Voice Pack
items.description: Expansion launch limited voice pack: fully performed voice pack referencing the new set's lore and characters in callouts.
items.flavor_text: The voice knows new cards before the pilot does. It warns them, sometimes. Politely.
items.art_prompt_hints: expansion launch pilot voice pack, fully performed callouts referencing new set lore and characters, theatrical event-themed

items.name: Quantum Core Singularity Hull
items.description: Signature Mythic hull: reality-folded quantum core texture with gravitational lensing around the silhouette and a dark singularity glyph at the core.
items.flavor_text: Scanners refuse to agree on the hull shape. The pilot files their own reports.
items.art_prompt_hints: premium mythic ship hull, reality-folded quantum core texture with gravitational lensing around silhouette and dark singularity glyph at core, apex signature

items.name: Reality Bender Card Back
items.description: Signature Mythic card back: shifting dimensional surface with a slow phase-fold animation and brief reality-glitch edges on tilt.
items.flavor_text: The card looks different to each opponent. The pilot always sees one card only.
items.art_prompt_hints: premium mythic card back, shifting dimensional surface with slow phase-fold animation and reality-glitch edges on tilt, apex animated

items.name: Event Horizon Battle Board
items.description: Signature Mythic battle board: black-hole event horizon backdrop with accretion disk, starlight lensing, and a deep sub-audio pressure bed.
items.flavor_text: The duel happens at the edge of something old and hungry. Mostly it keeps polite.
items.art_prompt_hints: premium mythic battle board backdrop, black hole event horizon with accretion disk starlight lensing and deep sub-audio pressure, apex cinematic

items.name: Transcendent Pilot Voice Pack
items.description: Signature Mythic voice pack: multi-layer voice with resonant harmonic overlays, subtle choral doubling, and dynamic mood-matching callouts.
items.flavor_text: The voice knows more than the pilot. Kind enough not to say.
items.art_prompt_hints: premium mythic pilot voice pack, multi-layer voice with resonant harmonic overlays subtle choral doubling and dynamic mood-matching callouts, apex vocal

items.name: Infinity Mythic Collection
items.description: Signature Mythic bundle: every Mythic item in the catalog at a single slight discount vs piecemeal. Apex collector acquisition.
items.flavor_text: The bundle contains everything the pilot has been chasing. The chase was the point, mostly.
items.art_prompt_hints: premium mythic collection bundle, apex aggregation of every mythic item with signature animated presentation panel, apex signature

items.name: Squadron Ace Hull
items.description: Milestone hull: clean gunmetal scheme with a small ace-of-spades wing marking. Unlocked after 100 PvP victories.
items.flavor_text: The pilot earned the marking one win at a time. Nobody can purchase the arithmetic.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned ship hull, clean gunmetal scheme with small ace-of-spades wing marking, disciplined disciplined-earned

items.name: Relic Forager Hull
items.description: Milestone hull: weathered bronze panels with etched salvage-run tally marks along the spine. Unlocked after 50 wrecks claimed.
items.flavor_text: Each tally is a salvage run. The hull remembers. The pilot, mostly.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned ship hull, weathered bronze with etched salvage-run tally marks along spine, salvage-veteran

items.name: Warp Courier Hull
items.description: Milestone hull: crisp navy-and-yellow courier livery with a warp-lane stripe down the dorsal spine. Unlocked after 200 hauling contracts completed.
items.flavor_text: Two hundred deliveries, zero lost cargo. The livery is receipt and brag.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned ship hull, crisp navy and yellow courier livery with warp-lane stripe down dorsal spine, professional utilitarian

items.name: Duel Champion Hull
items.description: Milestone hull: gold-and-black champion livery with an animated laurel motif on each wing. Unlocked by winning Season 1 tournament.
items.flavor_text: The laurel appeared overnight. The pilot refuses to explain the bracket they survived.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned ship hull, gold and black champion livery with animated laurel motif on each wing, victorious prestigious

items.name: Void Shepherd Hull
items.description: Milestone hull: deep-violet hull with animated star-map etching tracking the pilot's mapped exploration paths. Unlocked after 50 exploration missions.
items.flavor_text: The map changes as the pilot flies new paths. The hull redraws itself, quietly proud.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned ship hull, deep violet with animated star-map etching tracking pilot exploration paths, scholarly legendary

items.name: First Flight Trail
items.description: Milestone trail: simple bright white exhaust with a soft welcoming flare. Unlocked on completing the tutorial.
items.flavor_text: A trail every pilot gets for surviving the first hour. Worn proudly anyway.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned engine exhaust trail, simple bright white plume with soft welcoming flare, introductory friendly

items.name: Century Club Trail
items.description: Milestone trail: warm amber plume with a tiny century-marker particle burst every tenth boost. Unlocked after 100 missions completed.
items.flavor_text: The century marker arrives silently. The pilot counts along, often incorrectly, cheerfully.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned engine exhaust trail, warm amber plume with small century-marker particle burst every tenth boost, warm milestone

items.name: Nebula Mapper Trail
items.description: Milestone trail: drifting nebula-tint exhaust with brief scan-ring pings during sustained cruise. Unlocked after scanning 10 nebulae.
items.flavor_text: The trail knows where the pilot has been. Occasionally whispers a vector, unsolicited.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned engine exhaust trail, drifting nebula-tint plume with brief scan-ring pings during cruise, scholarly exploratory

items.name: Gravity Test Trail
items.description: Milestone trail: warped exhaust that bends subtly behind the ship as if still under gravity influence. Unlocked after surviving a gravity-well event.
items.flavor_text: The trail still bends. The gravity well is gone. The memory, apparently, is not.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned engine exhaust trail, warped plume bending subtly as if under lingering gravity influence, rare experiential

items.name: Chronicler of the Void
items.description: Milestone title awarded for completing the story quest chain. Animated starlight drifts along the title text on profile.
items.flavor_text: Five missions, one through-line, one title. Nobody else has exactly this version.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile title text styling, Chronicler of the Void in scholarly serif with animated starlight drifting along text, epic prestige

items.name: Squadron Commander
items.description: Milestone title awarded for leading a five-pilot fleet on twenty shared missions. Gold-trim text on profile.
items.flavor_text: No uniform comes with the title. The pilots follow anyway. That suffices.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile title text styling, Squadron Commander in military serif with gold trim, rare prestigious

items.name: Ember Eternal
items.description: Milestone title awarded for five consecutive come-from-behind victories. Warm ember-tinted text on profile.
items.flavor_text: Burned down to nothing five times. Came back each one. The ember kept agreeing.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile title text styling, Ember Eternal in warm ember-tinted serif with faint glow underline, uncommon grit

items.name: Nebula Cartographer
items.description: Milestone title awarded for mapping all five major nebulae in the star system. Pale cartographic text styling.
items.flavor_text: Mapped everything that drifts. Plotted nothing that stays still. The pilot prefers motion.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile title text styling, Nebula Cartographer in cartographic pale serif with small compass glyph underline, common scholarly

items.name: Void Emissary
items.description: Milestone title awarded for completing all diplomatic missions in the neutral zone. Quiet muted text on profile.
items.flavor_text: The pilot never raised their voice. Somehow, that is what got the treaty signed.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile title text styling, Void Emissary in muted diplomatic italic serif with thin under-rule, common quiet

items.name: First Wave Commemorative Banner
items.description: Milestone banner for pilots who joined during the first launch month. Animated wave-chevron motif with a thin gold foil strip.
items.flavor_text: The wave chevron confirms the date without asking anyone to look up. Convenient.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile banner, animated wave chevron motif with thin gold foil strip, rare commemorative

items.name: Ghost Fleet Banner
items.description: Milestone banner for pilots who recovered 10 abandoned fleets. Spectral drift of ghost-ship silhouettes moving slowly across the banner.
items.flavor_text: The fleet answered the pilot eventually. The banner is a mutual courtesy.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile banner, spectral drift of ghost ship silhouettes moving slowly across banner, epic haunting

items.name: Eclipse Witness Banner
items.description: Milestone banner for pilots present during a rare stellar-eclipse event. Dramatic corona backdrop with slow animated corona flicker and gold witness-mark.
items.flavor_text: The pilot was there. The banner insists quietly. The star remembers, also.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile banner, dramatic corona backdrop with slow animated corona flicker and gold witness-mark, legendary rare-event

items.name: Platinum Wing Earned
items.description: Milestone badge awarded at Platinum rank. Clean platinum wing engraving, distinct from the cosmetic variant by a small earned-mark.
items.flavor_text: The badge feels heavier than the cosmetic. Nobody else can tell. The pilot can.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile rank badge, clean platinum wing engraving with small earned-mark, epic rank

items.name: Crimson Talon Earned
items.description: Milestone badge awarded at Crimson Talon rank. Animated ember glow edges with a small earned-mark, distinct from the cosmetic variant.
items.flavor_text: The talon glows only for the pilot who earned it. Cosmetic versions are polite imitations.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned profile rank badge, animated ember glow edges with small earned-mark, legendary rank

items.name: Pioneer Card Back
items.description: Milestone card back awarded to the first 1000 active pilots. Navy foil with a numbered Pioneer sigil engraved at the card center.
items.flavor_text: The card's number is unique to the pilot. Nobody above them, ever.
items.art_prompt_hints: milestone-earned card back, navy foil with numbered Pioneer sigil engraved at center, legendary commemorative
